leaderboard.empty: No one has started a streak in this server yet. Be the first with `/streak claim`!

reset.title: 🔄 Streak Reset

already.zero: Your streak is already 0. No need to reset.

reset.success: Your streak has been reset to 0. Start again tomorrow!

restore.title: 🔁 Streak Restore
restore.desc:
You missed claiming yesterday, but your streak of **{streak} {emoji}** can be saved!

Vote for Kythia on **top.gg** and click the button below to restore your streak.

vote.required:
You haven't voted for Kythia on top.gg in the last 12 hours.

Click the button below to vote, then run `/streak claim` again!

restore.success: Your streak of **{streak} {emoji}** has been restored and extended! Keep it up! 🎉
restore.expired: You didn't restore your streak in time. Your streak has been reset. Start fresh! 💪
